mentionsLegales.title: Legal Notices
mentionsLegales.metaDescription: REPUTEXA legal notices: publisher, hosting LCEN art. 6, service providers, Impressum, CNIL, consumer mediation, intellectual property.
mentionsLegales.intro:
In accordance with Law No. 2004-575 of 21 June 2004 for confidence in the digital economy (LCEN) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), these legal notices identify the publisher of the site reputexa.fr, the technical service providers, the contact methods, and the recourse avenues. They are drafted to be complemented by the privacy policy (Loyalty and Reviews) and the terms and conditions of use.

Last updated: April 2026 — version 1.3.
mentionsLegales.editeur_content: The site reputexa.fr is published by REPUTEXA, a company currently being registered or registered in France (legal form, exact name, headquarters address, SIREN/SIRET number, VAT identification number if applicable: to be completed upon registration and displayed at the top of this section). In the meantime: professional contact details: contact@reputexa.fr. Share capital: if applicable, indicated after registration.
mentionsLegales.impressum_content: In accordance with the applicable requirements in Germany (§ 5 TMG) and in the European Union, the Impressum includes the publisher information above (name, headquarters, contact). These notices serve as Impressum for all users, including those located in Germany. Contact: contact@reputexa.fr.
mentionsLegales.directeur_content: The publication director is the individual identified as such with the host and the competent authority (founder / legal representative of REPUTEXA). Name and title: to be completed after the company is established.
mentionsLegales.hebergeur_content: In accordance with Article 6-I-2° of the LCEN, the following elements are specified. Web application (front and API): Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States — site and legal notices: vercel.com/legal; deployment may be operated via the European entity Vercel Netherlands B.V. according to your billing zone. Application data (PostgreSQL database, authentication, storage associated with the project): Supabase — project configured in the European Union region (eu-*) when available; privacy policy and DPA: supabase.com. Sending transactional emails: Resend — resend.com/legal. Payments: Stripe Payments Europe Ltd or applicable Stripe entity according to your country — stripe.com/legal. WhatsApp messaging (Zenith plan / alerts): Twilio Inc. or applicable subsidiary — twilio.com/legal. AI providers (text suggestions): OpenAI / Anthropic according to the configured API keys — processing governed by the conditions and DPA of these publishers. Subcontractors are contractually bound to confidentiality and data security (GDPR, art. 28). Merchant account data is generally hosted within the EU; some processing (e.g. AI API) may involve regulated transfers (standard contractual clauses, provider policies). Detail: Privacy policy. AI-based functionalities may produce errors; generated content is indicative — T&Cs (Article 5) and privacy policy (Section 8).
mentionsLegales.droit_content: The applicable law is French law. Without prejudice to the mandatory provisions of the user's country of residence in the European Union, these notices and the site are governed by French law. Consumer users residing in the EU retain the rights granted to them by the mandatory provisions of their country of residence.
mentionsLegales.prop_intel_content: The REPUTEXA platform, the SaaS software tool (features, code, architecture, associated documentation) and all content on the site (texts, graphics, logos, databases) are the exclusive property of REPUTEXA and are protected by copyright, trademark rights, and related rights. Any unauthorized reproduction, representation, or exploitation constitutes infringement subject to prosecution.
mentionsLegales.liens_content: The site may contain links to third-party sites. REPUTEXA exercises no control over these sites and disclaims any responsibility for their content. Creating links to reputexa.fr is subject to the prior agreement of the publisher.
mentionsLegales.cnil_content: For any questions regarding personal data, you can contact: contact@reputexa.fr. You have the right to file a complaint with the CNIL (National Commission for Information Technology and Freedoms), 3 Place de Fontenoy — TSA 80715 — 75334 PARIS CEDEX 07, France — www.cnil.fr — if you believe that the processing of your data does not comply with the GDPR. If you reside in another EU member state, you can contact the data protection authority in your country.
mentionsLegales.mediation_content: In accordance with Articles L.612-1 and following of the Consumer Code, any consumer has the right to resort free of charge to a consumer mediator for the amicable resolution of the dispute with a professional. After a prior written approach to REPUTEXA that remains unsuccessful, the consumer may contact the competent mediator whose identity will be specified on this page once the system is formalised (or the sectoral or general mediator to which REPUTEXA belongs). European online dispute resolution platform (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
mentionsLegales.contact_content: For any questions regarding these legal notices: contact@reputexa.fr.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.metaDescription: GDPR Privacy Policy: loyalty and reviews, purposes, subcontractors, durations, multi-establishments, STOP, import, AI.
confidentialite.intro: Last updated: April 2026. Version: 1.3 — unique document 'Loyalty & Reviews'. This document describes the processing of personal data related to review solicitation (WhatsApp, technical queue) and the loyalty programme (points, rewards, birthdays, checkout and terminal). It is consistent with the register of processing activities (Article 30 GDPR) published on this site. AI functionalities may produce erroneous outputs: they are indicative and must be validated by the User before dissemination (see Section 8). No system guarantees absolute security or compliance; REPUTEXA applies proportionate measures and updates this policy when processing or regulation evolves.

toc.label: 7. Zenith Plan — Review Collection and Final Customer Data
8. AI Guarantee — Data Not Used for Training

confidentialite.responsable_content:
The data controller for personal data within the meaning of Articles 4 and 26 GDPR is REPUTEXA, publisher of the site reputexa.fr, whose headquarters is located in France. The processing is documented in the register of processing activities (Article 30 GDPR), accessible on this site. REPUTEXA applies the principles of data minimisation, retention limitation, and purpose limitation.

For any questions regarding processing: contact@reputexa.fr.
confidentialite.roles_rgpd_content: REPUTEXA is the data controller for data related to the management of its own customers (user accounts, billing, support). REPUTEXA acts as a technical data processor (Article 28 GDPR) on behalf of its Users (Merchants) for: sending WhatsApp solicitations, review queue management, loyalty and rewards programmes (points, tiers, birthday gifts, associated campaigns), importing customer lists, and connected checkout or terminal functionalities, based on documented instructions from the merchant (account settings, loyalty rules, imported files). The Merchant remains solely responsible for the loyalty strategy, tiers, validated messages, and legal bases towards its own customers. Final customer data is only processed to execute these instructions. Processing may be pooled among different premises belonging to the same data controller to allow the customer to benefit from their advantages across the entire network (points usable at multiple shops of the same operator, depending on configuration). Records of consent or refusal (STOP) may be retained as proof of compliance (technical logging).
confidentialite.donnees_content: We collect, among other things: professional email address for account and authentication; billing identifiers and payment data processed by Stripe; content of reviews and data from your Google Business Profile when you connect the Google API; first name, last name, professional phone number, establishment name, address; language preference; technical data (IP address, server logs, session identifiers, strictly necessary cookies for operation and security). For the Zenith plan and loyalty: data transmitted by your systems (checkout, e-commerce, terminal) via webhooks or input (first name, phone, purchase context or amount, number of items if applicable, delivery status if applicable), balance or history of points and rewards, date of birth or birthday month when you collect them for related benefits, postal address or city if you register them for customer relations. Importing files (CSV, Excel, etc.): the columns you map (identity, phone, purchases, etc.) are processed to feed your loyalty programme or campaigns, under your responsibility regarding the legality of the initial collection (see also our T&Cs, import clause).
confidentialite.locale_content: To improve your user experience and offer you an interface, communications, and support in your language, we may deduce a language preference from the area code of your phone number (e.g. +44 for the UK, +39 for Italy, +34 for Spain, +49 for Germany). This information is used solely to personalise the language of the interface, emails, and payment portal. You can change the language in your account settings at any time.
confidentialite.finalites_content: Data is processed for: the execution of the contract and the provision of the service (account, subscription, subscribed functionalities); the management of the Merchant's loyalty programme: calculating and tracking points, awarding rewards (tiers, birthdays, one-off offers), personalising customer relations, multi-site management when the same data controller operates multiple premises; legitimate interest (security, fraud prevention, service improvement, anonymised technical audience measurement if applicable); consent when required (WhatsApp solicitations, non-essential cookies, commercial communications according to your configuration); legal obligations (accounting and tax retention of invoices, responding to authorities). The specific purposes concerning final customers are defined and communicated by the Merchant (point of sale, T&Cs, store policy).
confidentialite.sous_traitants_content: Your data may be processed by the following subcontractors, strictly within the scope of their mission and based on documented instructions: Stripe (payments, subscriptions, billing); Resend (transactional emails); OpenAI and/or Anthropic (generation of response suggestions, audio transcription if applicable); Supabase (database, authentication — project in EU region); Vercel (application hosting); Google (OAuth, Google Business Profile API); Twilio and/or Meta (WhatsApp depending on configuration); Cloudflare (Turnstile if activated). These providers are bound by standard contractual clauses (GDPR) or equivalents according to their public DPA. The list of subcontractors may evolve: update of this policy or your information space.
confidentialite.zenith_captation_title: 7. Zenith Plan — Review Collection and Final Customer Data
confidentialite.zenith_captation_content: The Zenith plan includes the automated collection of reviews ('Capture AI') and can be combined with messages related to the loyalty programme (benefits, reminders) according to the rules configured by the Merchant. WhatsApp contacts comply with the purposes and prior information defined by the Merchant (physical commerce or, for the online store, after delivery when the webhook transmits the appropriate status). REPUTEXA acts as a data processor (Article 28 GDPR); the Merchant remains responsible for processing its customers' data. For the same number and the same merchant account, a new review solicitation campaign is not triggered until 120 days after the start of the previous one (unless a displayed rule or contrary configuration is set). Data retained in the technical queue for review solicitation purposes are short-term data: they are anonymised or deleted at most 120 days after entering the queue (subject to opposition records or legal obligations), in accordance with the operational service settings. After the anti-solicitation period, a new invitation to review may again be scheduled for this number if it is not on the opposition list. Loyalty data (points history, active account) follows distinct durations — see the 'Retention Periods' section. Response 'STOP' or refusal: cessation of messages according to technical mechanisms; a broad opposition or request for total withdrawal may lead to the closure of the loyalty account and the loss of unused benefits, under the conditions set by the Merchant and specified in the 'Your Rights' section. Logging of consents/refusals: technical traces for proof purposes.
confidentialite.ia_content:
The content submitted for generating suggestions (responses to reviews, drafts of WhatsApp or SMS messages, establishment context) is processed by AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic or equivalents) solely to provide the functionality. Subject to the contractual policies in force, REPUTEXA configures the uses according to the 'no training' / zero retention options when available. You must check the providers' DPA for legal details. Do not transmit unnecessary or sensitive data.

The outputs of the models may be incorrect, incomplete, or unsuitable for the context; they do not constitute legal, tax, commercial, or reputation management advice provided by REPUTEXA.

The User (Merchant) acknowledges that the content generated by the AI is suggestions subject to error. The data controller remains responsible for final validation before sending or publishing. REPUTEXA cannot be held liable for the consequences related to dissemination without sufficient human control (commercial commitments, discounts, promises, language or substantive errors), subject to mandatory legal obligations. Contractual limits and complementary exclusions of liability: see T&Cs (Article 'Liability').
confidentialite.securite_content:
Data is processed with encryption in transit (TLS) and security measures at rest consistent with industry practices (managed hosting such as Supabase). The project is configured in the European Union region when possible. For the Zenith Plan, access to final customer data from Merchants is limited by design (automated processing, environment separation).

REPUTEXA implements a security policy proportionate to the risk: access management, dependency updates, monitoring application logs as permitted by the offering, and incident response according to internal procedures. No system is infallible; in the event of a security incident that may affect personal data, the measures provided in the 'Data Breaches' paragraph apply.

Register of processing activities (Article 30 GDPR): https://reputexa.fr/docs/registre-rgpd-reputexa.html (adapt domain if necessary).
confidentialite.cookies_content: We use strictly necessary cookies and local storage for the operation of the service (session, security preferences, possibly Cloudflare Turnstile captcha). Any cookie or tracker not essential to the provision of the service will be subject to your prior consent when required by regulation (consent banner). You can configure your browser to refuse cookies; some functionalities may then be degraded.
confidentialite.transferts_content: When subcontractors are located outside the European Union or processing is carried out there (e.g. US AI providers), transfers are governed by the instruments provided by the GDPR: standard contractual clauses of the European Commission, additional measures if applicable, and provider policies. You can request a copy of the applicable guarantees at contact@reputexa.fr.
confidentialite.durees_content:
We distinguish durations according to the purpose:

Review solicitation data (technical queue Zenith, excluding active loyalty account): short retention — the identifying elements necessary for the campaign are anonymised or deleted at most 120 days after entering the queue, except for aggregated or statistical data without direct identification; a new invitation to leave a review for the same number (not opposed) only becomes possible after the anti-solicitation period described in the Zenith section (120 days since the start of the previous campaign).

Loyalty data (points programme, rewards, history with the Merchant): retention for the entire duration of the customer's loyalty account activity with the Merchant on the platform. Account deemed inactive in the absence of qualified purchase or recorded loyalty interaction for thirty-six (36) consecutive months; thereafter, data may be deleted or anonymised according to the Merchant's procedures and service settings, subject to prior customer information when required by law and opposition lists.

Merchant user account and billing: duration of the contract plus accounting and tax obligations (often ten years for supporting documents, according to applicable law).

Opposition list (STOP): retention of the number or its fingerprint to cease solicitation, with no contractual duration limit set for the opposition itself.

Consent logs: retention for proof of compliance, reasonable duration in light of disputes. Durations may be adjusted to comply with a legal obligation or court decision.
confidentialite.violations_content: In the event of a personal data breach that may result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of individuals, REPUTEXA documents the incident, analyses the causes and, when required by regulation, notifies the competent control authority (including the CNIL in France) within the deadlines provided by the GDPR, and informs the affected individuals when the breach is likely to result in a high risk. Internal procedures aim to limit network and application impact. Operational details (technical logs, internal IP addresses) may be communicated to authorities as part of a legal obligation or founded request, but are not published on this site.
confidentialite.portabilite_content: From your account settings, you can download a structured export of your data (JSON) and request the permanent deletion of your account in accordance with the GDPR. The export includes, among other things, the profile, reviews, queue, blacklist, loyalty data managed through your merchant account, and associated consent logs. Deleting the account results in the deletion or anonymisation of associated data subject to legal retention obligations.
confidentialite.droits_content:
In accordance with the GDPR, you have the rights of access, rectification, deletion, limitation of processing, portability, opposition (notably for marketing), and the right to set directives regarding the fate of your data after your death (under French law). For merchant accounts: contact@reputexa.fr. For final customers of a store using REPUTEXA: first contact the Merchant; you can also use the deletion form hosted on this site (link at the bottom of this page). You can file a complaint with the CNIL (cnil.fr) or the control authority in your country of residence. Minors should not use the service without the consent of their legal guardian.

WhatsApp, STOP and loyalty: responding STOP ends the automatic messages of this type sent via the relevant channel. If you require complete removal from all contact lists of the Merchant or deletion of your loyalty account, cessation of solicitations may lead to closure of the loyalty account and loss of unused points or benefits, in accordance with the Merchant's loyalty regulations and applicable texts; request this at the point of sale or via the contact details provided on the information poster.

Automated decisions and profiling (Article 22 GDPR): the suggestions generated by the AI are proposals to be validated by the professional before sending or publishing; they do not produce legal effects vis-à-vis the final consumer without human validation on the Merchant's side.
confidentialite.contact_content: For any questions regarding the protection of your data: contact@reputexa.fr. Response time: we strive to respond within one month, which may be extended by two months in case of complexity, in accordance with the GDPR.
confidentialite.client_finaux_erasure_notice: If you have been solicited via WhatsApp in the context of the REPUTEXA service on behalf of a business and wish to request the deletion of your data without going through WhatsApp (STOP), you can use the dedicated form (same number as used at the merchant):

dataRightsClient.metaDescription: Request the deletion of data related to the number used for reviews or REPUTEXA loyalty (without merchant account, outside WhatsApp STOP).
dataRightsClient.title: Personal Data — Final Customers
dataRightsClient.subtitle: This form is intended for individuals contacted via REPUTEXA on behalf of a business, without an account on this site.
dataRightsClient.formIntro: Please provide the relevant phone number (in the same format as at checkout or on the order form). We will process the corresponding traces in our systems (review queue, opposition lists, associated logging, and if applicable, loyalty data hosted on behalf of the Merchant), within technical and legal limits and according to instructions received from the Data Controller. For the review only: without opposition, a new WhatsApp request for this number (same business) is generally not sent as long as 120 days have not elapsed since the start of the previous campaign. A broad deletion request may lead to the closure of the loyalty programme and the loss of associated benefits on the business side — see the Loyalty and Reviews policy and the store regulations.
dataRightsClient.phoneHint: Recommended international format. Requests are protected by an anti-robot check.

cgu.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
cgu.metaTitle: Terms and Conditions of Use | REPUTEXA
cgu.metaDescription: REPUTEXA T&Cs. SaaS service, Vision Pulse Zenith plans, Stripe billing, termination, force majeure, mediation, French law.
cgu.intro: Last updated: April 2026. Version: 1.3. These Terms and Conditions of Use (T&Cs) constitute the framework contract between REPUTEXA and the user of the service. They cover the use of the e-reputation platform, review collection (including Zenith), conversational AI tools, and multi-channel loyalty functionalities. They apply to any subscription taken out on reputexa.fr, without prejudice to the imperative rights of consumers. The privacy policy (Loyalty and Reviews version) and legal notices are an integral part of the contractual documentation. REPUTEXA operates artificial intelligence models: their outputs may be inaccurate or unsuitable; any suggestion produced by the service must be reviewed and validated by the User before sending or publication (see Article 5).

toc.label: 3. Language Differentiation Clause — AI Response Language
7. Zenith Plan — Merchant Obligations and Liability Limitation
Annex — Customer Information Model (loyalty, checkout, WhatsApp)
8. Modification of the T&Cs and the Service
10. Suspension, Termination and End of Subscription

cgu.objet_content: These T&Cs define the terms of access and use of the REPUTEXA service, e-reputation SaaS platform. By creating an account or subscribing to a plan, you unreservedly accept these conditions.
cgu.plans_content: REPUTEXA offers several subscription plans (Vision, Pulse, Zenith and possible extensions). The functionalities (review aggregation, AI responses, alerts, reporting, loyalty programme, connected terminal or checkout, customer file import) vary according to the plan and activated modules. Detailed descriptions are available on the Pricing page.
cgu.langue_title: 3. Language Differentiation Clause — AI Response Language
cgu.langue_content: By contractual provision, the language of responses generated by the AI is differentiated according to the subscribed plan: Vision Plan: responses to reviews are generated exclusively in the establishment's language (user profile language). The service does not provide responses in other languages. Pulse and Zenith Plans: the service is multilingual; responses are generated natively in the customer's review language (automatic detection of the review language and response in that same language). This clause is an integral part of the service conditions and can only be modified in the event of a plan change.
cgu.facturation_content: Prices displayed are exclusive of tax (net). VAT is calculated and applied automatically by Stripe according to the buyer's country and the applicable rules (intra-community VAT, local rate, etc.). Payment is collected by Stripe (cards, SEPA, local means). The subscription is recurring (monthly or annually). Any month started is due; in case of termination, no prorated refund will be granted except for mandatory legal provisions or commercial goodwill indicated on the site. Invoices are available in the customer area and via the Stripe client portal.
cgu.responsabilite_content:
REPUTEXA fournit un outil logiciel et intervient en qualité de prestataire technique et sous-traitant au sens du RGPD pour les traitements confiés par le marchand. L'Utilisateur (Commerçant) est seul responsable de la licéité de ses propres traitements (bases légales, information et consentements, affichage en point de vente, règlement de fidélité) et du contenu qu'il publie, valide ou transmet. REPUTEXA ne saurait être tenue responsable des manquements de l'Utilisateur aux obligations RGPD, ePrivacy ou au droit de la concurrence. Le service est fourni « en l'état » ; REPUTEXA met en œuvre des efforts raisonnables de disponibilité sans garantie de résultat ni d'absence d'erreur. Sauf fraude ou dol prouvé, la responsabilité de REPUTEXA est limitée aux montants effectivement payés par l'Utilisateur au cours des douze (12) mois précédant le fait générateur, sauf disposition légale impérative contraire.

Intelligence artificielle — nature du service et limites : REPUTEXA exploite des modèles d'intelligence artificielle (prestataires techniques tiers) pour générer des propositions automatisées (notamment réponses aux avis, brouillons de messages). Ces systèmes peuvent produire des erreurs, imprécisions, formulations inadaptées ou des contenus ne correspondant pas au contexte réel ou à l'intention du Commerçant. L'Utilisateur en prend expressément acte.

Non-responsabilité IA : les contenus générés par l'IA sont fournis uniquement à titre de suggestions et doivent être relus, adaptés et validés par l'Utilisateur avant tout envoi ou publication. Le Commerçant reste seul responsable des textes qu'il diffuse et des effets de leur utilisation au regard du droit des consommateurs, de la concurrence et de la réputation. Sauf dol ou fraude prouvé, REPUTEXA ne saurait être tenue responsable des dommages directs ou indirects résultant de l'utilisation ou de la diffusion de suggestions d'IA (y compris erreurs factuelles, maladresses, incompréhensions ou propos potentiellement inappropriés), ni des engagements commerciaux pouvant en découler ; les limitations et le plafond de responsabilité prévus au présent article s'appliquent pleinement, sous réserve des dispositions légalement impératives.

Valeur des points : les points de fidélité cumulés n'ont aucune valeur marchande ou monétaire. Ils ne peuvent en aucun cas être convertis en espèces ou faire l'objet d'un remboursement. Le Commerçant se réserve le droit de modifier les barèmes de récompenses à tout moment, sous réserve d'en informer ses clients conformément au droit applicable. REPUTEXA ne convertit pas les points en espèces.

Importation de données tierces : lors de l'utilisation de la fonction d'importation de fichiers clients, le Commerçant garantit avoir collecté les données de manière licite et disposer du droit de les transférer sur la plateforme REPUTEXA. REPUTEXA décline toute responsabilité en cas d'importation de listes de contacts n'ayant pas donné leur consentement préalable ou ne reposant pas sur une autre base légale appropriée.

Pour les données des clients finaux (sollicitation d'avis, messagerie, fidélité), l'Utilisateur est le responsable du traitement et REPUTEXA agit sur ses instructions documentées. L'Utilisateur s'engage à un usage loyal des canaux : respect de la finalité annoncée au client (avis, fidélité, récompenses) et des règles anti-spam applicables.

Lorsque l'Utilisateur active des fonctionnalités de motivation d'équipe ou de classement interne, il garantit l'exactitude des informations saisies (identités ou pseudonymes) et informe préalablement les personnes concernées conformément au droit du travail et aux usages de l'entreprise (y compris, le cas échéant, les instances représentatives). Ces fonctionnalités sont conçues comme des outils de valorisation (objectifs collectifs, récompenses) et non comme un dispositif de surveillance sanctionnante des personnes ; toute utilisation détournée à des fins disciplinaires relève de la seule responsabilité de l'Utilisateur. Les liens de partage d'équipe doivent être limités aux personnes autorisées ; ils sont fournis sous forme de liens sécurisés non indexés par les moteurs de recherche.
cgu.droit_content: Les présentes CGU sont soumises au droit français. Pour les professionnels, à défaut d'accord amiable, compétence attribuée aux tribunaux compétents de Paris, sous réserve des règles de compétence matérielle. Le client consommateur résidant dans l'Union européenne peut saisir les tribunaux de son lieu de résidence ou ceux de Paris, conformément au règlement Bruxelles I bis. Pour les litiges de faible monteur, les tribunaux d'instance ou de proximité peuvent être compétents selon le droit français.
cgu.zenith_obligations_title: 7. Plan Zenith — Obligations du Commerçant et limitation de responsabilité
cgu.zenith_obligations_content:
L'activation du plan Zenith et l'utilisation de la collecte automatisée d'avis via WhatsApp (« IA de Capture »), éventuellement combinée à des messages de fidélité, imposent au Commerçant une information claire et préalable. Conformément aux articles 13 et 14 du RGPD et à l'article L.34-5 du Code des postes et des communications électroniques, le Commerçant doit informer ses clients (point de vente, checkout en ligne, CGV) : (1) de la collecte du numéro ; (2) des finalités (fidélité, récompenses, sollicitation d'avis via REPUTEXA selon le cas) ; (3) du droit d'opposition (STOP et conséquences éventuelles sur le compte programme). Pour l'e-commerce, une case de consentement distincte peut être requise avant tout envoi. Cette obligation incombe au Commerçant en tant que responsable de traitement. REPUTEXA, en sous-traitant technique, ne peut être tenue responsable des manquements du Commerçant.

Le dispositif intègre des garde-fous de fréquence et une liste d'opposition (STOP). Les messages doivent rester proportionnés aux finalités annoncées. Les suggestions rédigées par l'IA doivent être validées par le Commerçant avant envoi.
cgu.annexe_fidelite_title: Annexe — Modèle d'information clients (fidélité, caisse, WhatsApp)
cgu.annexe_fidelite_content:
Le texte ci-dessous est un modèle de transparence à insérer dans votre règlement de fidélité, formulaire d'inscription ou affichage en caisse. Remplacez [Nom du magasin] par votre enseigne et indiquez le lien vers votre politique de confidentialité unique (idéalement la même URL que l'affiche REPUTEXA « Fidélité et Avis »). Aide-mémoire : faites valider par votre conseil.

En rejoignant le programme de fidélité et en communiquant vos données à [Nom du magasin], vous êtes informé(e) que votre numéro et votre historique d'achat peuvent être utilisés pour gérer vos points, vos récompenses (paliers, avantages d'anniversaire), vous contacter sur votre compte et, le cas échéant, vous solliciter pour une enquête de satisfaction, selon notre politique de confidentialité.

Si vous faites partie d'un réseau de magasins exploités par le même responsable, vos avantages peuvent être mutualisés entre ces boutiques sauf mention contraire au comptoir.

Les points de fidélité n'ont pas de valeur monétaire : ils ne sont pas convertibles en espèces ni remboursables. La boutique peut adapter le barème des récompenses en vous informant comme prévu par la loi.

Lorsque nous utilisons WhatsApp (collecte d'avis ou messages liés au programme), l'outil technique REPUTEXA peut être utilisé pour l'envoi. Répondre STOP met fin aux messages ; un retrait total peut entraîner la clôture du compte fidélité et la perte des points non utilisés, comme précisé au comptoir.

Conformément au RGPD, vous disposez des droits d'accès, de rectification, d'effacement, d'opposition, à la limitation et à la portabilité ; contactez les coordonnées figurant dans notre politique de confidentialité.
cgu.modifications_title: 8. Modification des CGU et du service
cgu.modifications_content: REPUTEXA peut modifier les présentes CGU, les tarifs ou les fonctionnalités du service. Les utilisateurs seront informés par tout moyen approprié (e-mail, notification sur le site, bandeau). La poursuite de l'utilisation du service après information vaut acceptation des nouvelles conditions, sauf droit de résiliation dans les délais prévus par la loi. En cas de modification substantielle défavorable, le consommateur peut résilier sans frais dans les conditions légales.
cgu.mediation_content: Le consommateur peut recourir gratuitement à un médiateur de la consommation conformément au Code de la consommation, après tentative de résolution amiable directe avec REPUTEXA. L'identité du médiateur sera précisée sur le site une fois le dispositif formalisé. Plateforme européenne RLL : https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
cgu.suspension_content: L'abonnement est résiliable selon les modalités prévues par Stripe et les offres affichées au moment de la souscription. En cas de défaut de paiement, d'usage manifestement abusif du service (tentative de contournement des limites, atteinte à la sécurité, utilisation contraire aux CGU) ou d'impossibilité technique durable imputable à un tiers, REPUTEXA peut suspendre ou résilier l'accès après mise en demeure lorsque la situation le permet. À la fin du contrat, l'accès au service cesse ; les données du compte marchand sont traitées conformément à la politique de confidentialité (export, suppression, conservation légale). Les données des clients finaux traitées pour le compte du marchand (Zenith) relèvent des instructions du responsable de traitement (le marchand) dans la limite du techniquement possible.
cgu.force_majeure_content: REPUTEXA ne saurait être tenue responsable de l'inexécution ou de la mauvaise exécution de ses obligations lorsque celle-ci est due à un cas de force majeure ou à un événement hors de son contrôle raisonnable (pannes généralisées d'infrastructure Internet, catastrophes, conflits, décisions des autorités ou des prestataires essentiels, cyberattaques de grande ampleur malgré des mesures de sécurité appropriées). Le service peut être interrompu temporairement pour maintenance planifiée ou d'urgence ; une information raisonnable sera fournie lorsque les circonstances le permettent.
cgu.contact_content: Pour toute question relative aux présentes CGU : contact@reputexa.fr.

terms.title: Conditions Générales de Vente
terms.metaDescription: Conditions générales de vente de REPUTEXA. Abonnement SaaS, droit de rétractation, responsabilité, juridiction française.
terms.intro: Dernière mise à jour : mars 2026. Les présentes Conditions Générales de Vente (CGV) régissent l'utilisation du service REPUTEXA et s'appliquent à tout abonnement souscrit sur le site reputexa.fr.
terms.objet_content: Les présentes CGV définissent les modalités d'accès et d'utilisation du service REPUTEXA, plateforme SaaS d'e-réputation. En créant un compte ou en souscrivant à un abonnement, vous acceptez sans réserve les présentes conditions. Si vous n'acceptez pas ces CGV, vous ne devez pas utiliser le service.
terms.services_lead: REPUTEXA propose un service d'agrégation des avis Google, de suggestions de réponses par intelligence artificielle, d'alertes en cas d'avis négatifs et de reporting. Les fonctionnalités varient selon le plan choisi : <vision>Vision</vision>, <pulse>Pulse</pulse> et <zenith>Zenith</zenith>. La description détaillée des offres est disponible sur la page Tarifs.
terms.services_2_1_p1: L'utilisateur reconnaît et accepte que le service REPUTEXA puisse être configuré pour publier des réponses de manière automatisée.
terms.services_2_1_resp: <resp>Responsabilité :</resp> L'utilisateur demeure seul responsable des contenus publiés sur ses fiches d'établissement. Il lui appartient de configurer les filtres et les tons de l'IA de manière appropriée.
terms.services_2_1_edit: <edit>Droit de modification :</edit> L'utilisateur peut à tout moment modifier ou supprimer une réponse publiée via son tableau de bord ou directement sur la plateforme concernée (Google).
terms.services_2_1_neg: <neg>Cas des avis négatifs :</neg> Pour les avis jugés « négatifs » (selon les critères du plan choisi), le système peut être configuré pour suspendre l'automatisation et requérir une validation manuelle.
terms.services_2_2_p1: Les réponses proposées par l'IA sont des <sug>suggestions</sug>. L'utilisateur est tenu de<validate> valider, adapter ou modifier</validate> tout contenu avant publication sur les plateformes d'avis. Aucune réponse ne peut être publiée automatiquement sans action explicite de validation du client.
terms.services_2_3_p1: Les alertes par WhatsApp (notifications en cas d'avis négatif ou de signalement) sont fournies via l'API <wa>WhatsApp (Meta)</wa>. Leur disponibilité et leur bon fonctionnement dépendent des conditions d'utilisation et des politiques de Meta. REPUTEXA n'est pas le fournisseur du service WhatsApp.
terms.services_2_4_p1: La demande de suppression ou de modération d'un avis auprès des plateformes (notamment Google) relève des politiques et des processus de ces <third>tiers</third>. REPUTEXA peut fournir des outils ou des suggestions (arguments juridiques, formulaires) pour vous accompagner, mais ne garantit aucun résultat : la décision finale appartient à Google ou à l'opérateur concerné.
terms.inscription_p1: L'inscription nécessite une adresse email valide et la création d'un mot de passe sécurisé. Vous êtes responsable de la confidentialité de vos identifiants et de toutes les actions réalisées depuis votre compte. REPUTEXA se réserve le droit de suspendre ou fermer tout compte en cas de violation des CGV ou d'utilisation frauduleuse.
terms.abonnement_p1: L'abonnement est <rec>récurrent</rec> (mensuel ou annuel selon le plan choisi) et fait l'objet d'un prélèvement automatique via <stripe>Stripe</stripe>. Le paiement est collecté par Stripe, Inc. (cartes bancaires, SEPA, moyens de paiement locaux). Les tarifs sont indiqués en euros TTC sur la page Tarifs.
terms.abonnement_li1: La facturation intervient à la souscription, puis à chaque date anniversaire de renouvellement
terms.abonnement_li2: <due>Tout mois ou période entamé est intégralement dû</due> ; aucun remboursement prorata temporis ne sera accordé en cas de résiliation en cours de période
terms.abonnement_li3: Les factures sont disponibles dans votre espace client et via le portail client Stripe
terms.abonnement_li4: En cas de paiement refusé, vous serez informé ; vous disposerez d'un délai pour mettre à jour vos informations de paiement avant suspension du service
terms.multi_title: 5. Multi-établissements, prix dégressifs et gestion des crédits
terms.multi_p1: Les plans permettant plusieurs établissements (Pulse, Zenith) appliquent une <policy>politique de prix dégressifs</policy> : plus le nombre d'emplacements souscrits est élevé, plus le prix unitaire par établissement diminue (remises progressives selon les paliers, détaillées sur la page Tarifs).
terms.multi_prorata_intro: Lorsqu'un client ajoute un ou plusieurs établissements en cours de période de facturation :
terms.multi_prorata_li1: <pr>Un prorata immédiat est appliqué</pr> au prorata temporis pour les jours restants jusqu'à la prochaine échéance, en tenant compte du barème dégressif
terms.multi_prorata_li2: Le complément est facturé et prélevé immédiatement lors de l'ajout
terms.multi_prorata_li3: Le client accepte cette facturation en validant l'ajout d'établissement(s)
terms.multi_h4_downgrade: Passage à un plan inférieur ou réduction du nombre d'emplacements (downgrade)
terms.multi_downgrade_p1: En cas de passage à un plan moins cher ou de réduction du nombre d'établissements souscrits, la gestion financière est assurée par <stripe>Stripe</stripe> : une <credit>note de crédit</credit> est générée sur le compte client pour la partie non utilisée de la période en cours, crédit qui sera déduit des prochaines factures. Les données et établissements déjà créés sont <kept>conservés</kept> ; seuls les accès sont limités au nouveau quota (les emplacements au-delà du quota sont désactivés jusqu'à un nouvel upgrade). Aucune suppression de données n'est effectuée du fait d'un downgrade.
terms.retract_p1: Conformément à l'article L. 221-18 du Code de la consommation, le consommateur dispose d'un délai de 14 jours calendaires pour exercer son droit de rétractation.
terms.retract_p2: <waive>Renonciation express au droit de rétractation – exécution immédiate :</waive> En créant un compte, en activant une période d'essai ou en accédant au service, le client demande expressément l'exécution immédiate du service numérique. Conformément à l'article L. 221-25 du Code de la consommation, le client renonce irrévocablement à son droit de rétractation pour ce service, dès lors que l'exécution a commencé avec son accord préalable exprès.
terms.resiliation_p1: Vous pouvez résilier votre abonnement à tout moment depuis votre espace client ou via le portail client Stripe. La résiliation prend effet à la fin de la période en cours ; aucun prorata ne sera appliqué pour les jours restants.
terms.resiliation_p2: REPUTEXA se réserve le droit de suspendre ou résilier l'accès en cas de non-paiement, de violation des CGV ou d'usage contraire à l'éthique. Les remboursements sont traités au cas par cas, conformément à la réglementation en vigueur.
terms.liability_intro: REPUTEXA s'engage à fournir un service de qualité conforme à sa description. Les clauses ci-dessous s'appliquent sans restriction, quel que soit le chiffre d'affaires du client.
terms.liability_81_p1: La responsabilité totale de REPUTEXA, tous faits et dommages confondus, est strictement plafonnée au montant des sommes effectivement versées par le client au titre de l'abonnement au cours des douze (12) derniers mois précédant le fait générateur de responsabilité. En aucun cas REPUTEXA ne pourra être tenue responsable des dommages indirects, incluant notamment sans s'y limiter : la perte de profits, la perte de chiffre d'affaires, la perte de clients, la perte de données, les préjudices commerciaux, la perte de données liées aux avis ou à la fiche Google Business Profile, ou tout autre préjudice économique de même nature.
terms.liability_82_p1: REPUTEXA fournit un outil d'assistance proposant des <sug>suggestions</sug> de réponses générées par des modèles d'intelligence artificielle. Ces suggestions sont fournies à titre strictement indicatif. Le client est l'<edit>unique responsable éditorial</edit> des réponses qu'il choisit de publier sur les plateformes d'avis. REPUTEXA décline toute responsabilité quant aux erreurs, inexactitudes, hallucinations, propos inappropriés, non conformes ou illicites que pourraient contenir les contenus générés par l'IA. Le client s'engage à vérifier, adapter et valider tout contenu avant publication.
terms.liability_83_title: 8.3 Indépendance de Google et suppression d'avis
terms.liability_83_p1: REPUTEXA est une entreprise indépendante de Google LLC, Google Ireland Limited et de toute entité du groupe Google. REPUTEXA n'exerce aucun contrôle sur les services, API, politiques ou conditions d'utilisation de Google. La <mod>suppression ou la modération d'avis</mod> dépend exclusivement des tiers (Google et autres plateformes) ; REPUTEXA fournit un accompagnement (arguments, formulaires) mais ne peut garantir aucun résultat. Tout changement apporté par Google à ses API, à ses règles de modération, à la suspension ou la suppression d'une fiche Google Business Profile, ou à toute autre modification de ses services, ne peut donner lieu à un remboursement, une indemnisation ou une réduction tarifaire de la part de REPUTEXA. Le client assume l'ensemble des risques liés à l'utilisation des services Google.
terms.liability_84_p1: Les perturbations, indisponibilités ou défaillances imputables à des tiers (Google, Stripe, hébergeurs, prestataires techniques) ne sauraient engager la responsabilité de REPUTEXA au-delà de ses obligations contractuelles expressément prévues aux présentes.
terms.fm_p1: <fm>Force majeure :</fm> REPUTEXA ne pourra être tenue pour responsable du non-respect de ses obligations en cas de force majeure au sens de l'article 1218 du Code civil (événement échappant au contrôle raisonnable du débiteur, imprévisible, irrésistible et extérieur).
terms.fm_p2: <divis>Divisibilité :</divis> Si une ou plusieurs stipulations des présentes CGV sont jugées nulles ou inapplicables par une décision de justice devenue définitive, les autres stipulations conserveront toute leur force et leur portée.
terms.ip_p1: REPUTEXA conserve la propriété exclusive de la plateforme, des algorithmes, des interfaces et de toute marque associée. L'abonnement vous accorde un droit d'usage non exclusif et non transférable, strictement limité à votre usage professionnel. Toute reproduction ou exploitation non autorisée est prohibée.
terms.cgvchg_p1: REPUTEXA peut modifier les présentes CGV. Les modifications substantielles seront communiquées par email au minimum 30 jours avant leur entrée en vigueur. En cas de désaccord, vous pourrez résilier votre abonnement avant la date d'application. La poursuite de l'utilisation du service vaut acceptation des nouvelles conditions.
terms.law_p1: Les présentes CGV sont soumises au <law>droit français</law>. À défaut d'accord amiable, il est attribué <court>compétence exclusive au Tribunal de Commerce de Paris</court> pour tout litige relatif à leur interprétation ou à leur exécution.
terms.law_p2: Le client consommateur résidant dans l'Union européenne conserve la faculté de saisir les tribunaux de son lieu de résidence, conformément au Règlement (UE) n° 1215/2012 (Bruxelles I bis).
terms.cgv_contact_p: Pour toute question relative aux présentes CGV : <link>contact@reputexa.fr</link>.

sentinel.title: Circuit Performance Level
sentinel.body: Our system is designed like a racing car. We have performance probes (Sentinel) that check responsiveness every minute. Today, we are operating at under 120 ms, which is 5 times faster than the average of traditional cash register software.

fr.noChange: Ce qui change pour vous : Absolument rien pour l'instant. Vous conservez l'intégralité de vos accès au plan ZÉNITH à titre gracieux jusqu'à la fin de votre période d'essai, le {trialEndDate}.
fr.charge: Le premier prélèvement de {planPrice} n'interviendra qu'à cette date, sur le plan que vous venez de sélectionner.
fr.closing: Nous restons à votre entière disposition pour vous accompagner dans la croissance de votre établissement.
fr.lossNote: 💡 En passant sur ce plan à la fin de votre essai, vous n'aurez plus accès aux fonctionnalités exclusives du plan ZÉNITH mais uniquement à celles du plan {planName}.

en.title: Plan selection confirmed
en.confirm: We confirm that your choice of the {planName} plan has been recorded for your future subscription.
en.noChange: What changes for you: Nothing for now. You keep full access to the ZENITH plan at no charge until the end of your trial period on {trialEndDate}.
en.charge: The first charge of {planPrice} will only occur on that date, for the plan you have just selected.
en.closing: We remain at your disposal to support the growth of your business.
en.lossNote: 💡 By switching to this plan at the end of your trial, you will no longer have access to ZENITH-only features—only those of the {planName} plan.

de.title: Bestätigung Ihrer Planwahl
de.confirm: Wir bestätigen, dass Ihre Wahl des Plans {planName} für Ihr künftiges Abonnement gespeichert wurde.
de.noChange: Was sich für Sie ändert: Vorerst nichts. Sie behalten den vollen Zugang zum ZENITH-Plan bis zum Ende Ihrer Testphase am {trialEndDate}.
de.charge: Die erste Abbuchung von {planPrice} erfolgt erst an diesem Tag für den von Ihnen gewählten Plan.
de.closing: Wir stehen Ihnen zur Verfügung, um das Wachstum Ihres Betriebs zu unterstützen.

es.title: Confirmación de su elección de plan
es.confirm: Confirmamos que su elección del plan {planName} quedó registrada para su próxima suscripción.
es.noChange: Qué cambia para usted: De momento, nada. Mantiene el acceso completo al plan ZENITH sin coste hasta el final de su periodo de prueba, el {trialEndDate}.
es.charge: El primer cargo de {planPrice} solo tendrá lugar en esa fecha, para el plan que acaba de seleccionar.
es.closing: Seguimos a su disposición para apoyar el crecimiento de su negocio.
es.lossNote: 💡 Al pasar a este plan al finalizar la prueba, ya no tendrá funciones exclusivas de ZENITH—solo las del plan {planName}.

it.title: Conferma della scelta del piano
it.confirm: Confermiamo che la scelta del piano {planName} è stata registrata per il tuo abbonamento futuro.
it.noChange: Cosa cambia per te: Nulla per ora. Mantieni l’accesso completo al piano ZENITH senza costi fino alla fine del periodo di prova, il {trialEndDate}.
it.charge: Il primo addebito di {planPrice} avverrà solo in quella data, per il piano che hai appena selezionato.
it.closing: Restiamo a disposizione per supportare la crescita della tua attività.
it.lossNote: 💡 Passando a questo piano al termine della prova, non avrai più accesso alle funzionalità esclusive ZENITH—solo a quelle del piano {planName}.

pt.title: Confirmação da sua escolha de plano
pt.confirm: Confirmamos que a sua escolha do plano {planName} foi registada para a sua futura subscrição.
pt.noChange: O que muda para si: Por agora, nada. Mantém acesso total ao plano ZENITH sem custo até ao fim do período de teste, a {trialEndDate}.
pt.charge: O primeiro débito de {planPrice} só ocorrerá nessa data, para o plano que acabou de selecionar.

pt.lossNote: 💡 Ao mudar para este plano no fim do teste, deixará de ter as funcionalidades exclusivas ZENITH—apenas as do plano {planName}.

ja.title: プラン選択の確認
ja.confirm: 本サブスクリプション用に{planName}プランをお選びいただいたことを確認いたします。
ja.noChange: 変更点：現時点ではありません。無償のZENITHプランへのアクセスは、お試し期間終了日の{trialEndDate}まで継続します。
ja.charge: {planPrice}の初回請求は、その日にのみ発生し、ご選択されたプランに適用されます。
ja.closing: 事業の成長をサポートできるよう引き続きサポートいたします。
ja.lossNote: 💡 試用終了後にこのプランへ移行すると、ZENITH専用機能は利用できず、{planName}プランの機能のみとなります。

zh.title: 确认您的方案选择
zh.confirm: 我们已记录您为未来订阅所选的{planName}方案。
zh.noChange: 对您有何变化：目前没有任何变化。在试用期结束日{trialEndDate}之前，您仍可免费完整使用 ZENITH 方案。
zh.charge: 首次扣款{planPrice}仅在该日期进行，对应您刚选择的方案。
zh.closing: 我们随时支持您的业务增长。
zh.lossNote: 💡 试用结束后若切换到该方案，将无法再使用 ZENITH 专属功能，仅保留 {planName} 方案功能。

welcomeElite.line3: The heart of the experience: receive your alerts in real-time on WhatsApp. A simple click to stay protected 24/7.

ApiAdmin.broadcastFormatRawUserPrompt:
The text below is a free draft (notes, lists, phrases). Transform it into a professional informational email for merchants subscribed to REPUTEXA.
If the DEPOSIT CONTEXT below is relevant, factually cite product developments (without jargon); otherwise, stick to the draft only.

Source text:
{raw}{extra}

Respond in JSON only, without markdown: an object with the keys subject (email subject, one line in English) and html (HTML fragment only: paragraphs, lists, emphasis; no html/head/body).

ApiAdmin.investorMetricsChatSystemPrompt:
You are a senior FP&A director (English), for a restricted REPUTEXA committee.
You have a structured file below: MRR, Stripe cash flow, monthly historical paid invoices (multiple years if Stripe goes back far enough in pagination), plan mix, short and long cohorts, estimated profitability per client (pro rata MRR), burn vs growth, Executive Summary texts.

Strict rules:
- All figures, percentages and dates must come from the file. No invented or 'approximate' amounts without indicating.
- If a period or data does not appear in the file, say so and propose what to collect — do not guess.
- Willingly cross MRR, historical collections, cohorts and estimated margins for a reading type due diligence.
- Style: reasoned analysis, short subtitles, bullets, consulting tone (clear, decisive), without filler.
- One framing sentence: indicative / unaudited figures, no automatic decision executed based on this chat.

FILE:
{context}

ApiAdmin.autoHealClaudeAskPrompt:
You are a senior DevOps engineer for REPUTEXA (Next.js/Supabase SaaS). Analyse this Sentinel incident and generate the necessary correction for Auto-Healing.

SERVICE FAILURE: {service}
ERROR MESSAGE: {errorMessage}
LATENCY: {latency}{filesBlock}{forgeSection}

STRICT INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Identify the precise root cause (faulty code, missing config, third-party outage, timeout)
2. Choose the action type:
   - "code_fix"         → error in identifiable and correctable source code
   - "deploy_hook"      → restart sufficient (timeout, lost connection)
   - "env_issue"        → missing or invalid environment variable
   - "external_outage"  → outage of third-party provider (OpenAI/Twilio/Anthropic down)
3. If "code_fix": generate the COMPLETE and functional content of the corrected file
4. If "env_issue" or "external_outage": deploy_needed = false

Respond ONLY in valid JSON (zero markdown, zero code blocks) with the fields diagnosis, action_type, confidence, code_fix, deploy_needed, summary_for_dashboard, prevention.

ApiAi.weeklyInsightModelLanguageHint: Write all text fields of the JSON in English.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightPromptRules:
You are the data e-reputation director of a Fortune 500 company. You analyse customer reviews of a premises to produce an ultra-precise weekly report.

STRICT SEMANTIC ANALYSIS RULES:
- Never say 'people love the food' or generalities.
- Provide concrete facts: 'The keyword 'Caesar Salad' appears 4 times with a positive connotation regarding freshness.'
- Correlate signals: 'The word 'Wait' is correlated with reviews from Saturday night.'
- Detect weak signals: 'Staff seems stressed on weekends' if hints suggest it.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightScarceReviewsNote: IMPORTANT: only {count} reviews — be cautious, qualify the analysis ('early signals'), no broad statements.
ApiAi.weeklyInsightPromptJsonSpec:
You must produce a JSON exactly in this format:
{
  "topSection": "What gained points (short phrases, precise data)",
  "watchSection": "Weak signals or recurring issues to monitor",
  "adviceSection": "A concrete and profitable action (e.g. Shift the 7 PM shift to 6:30 PM to absorb the detected peak)",
  "fullReport": "Complete report in several paragraphs, Fortune 500 style",
  "trendSeverity": 0-100 (0=no issue, 100=critical alert)
}

privacyRoute.metaDescription: Privacy policy and personal data protection of REPUTEXA. GDPR compliance, Google review management, Stripe payments.
privacyRoute.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This policy outlines how REPUTEXA collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacyRoute.s1_p1: The data controller for personal data is REPUTEXA, publisher of the site reputexa.co.uk, headquartered in the UK.
privacyRoute.s1_p2: We process your data lawfully, fairly, and transparently, in accordance with the GDPR.
privacyRoute.s2_li1: Email: professional email address for account creation, communications, and authentication
privacyRoute.s2_li2: Billing Data: identity, contact details, and payment information provided to Stripe for processing subscriptions and issuing invoices
privacyRoute.s2_li3: Access to Reviews via Google API: content of reviews, ratings, dates, data from your Google Business Profile (see section 4)
privacyRoute.s2_li4: Identification and Professional Data: name, surname, phone, establishment name, address, Google Location ID
privacyRoute.s2_li5: Technical Data: IP address, login logs, cookies (see section 8)
privacyRoute.s3_intro: Data is processed for the following purposes, based on the legal bases indicated:
privacyRoute.s3_li1: Contract Execution: account creation, access to service, subscription management
privacyRoute.s3_li2: Legitimate Interest: service improvement, internal analytics, fraud prevention
privacyRoute.s3_li3: Consent: newsletter, marketing communications (revocable at any time)
privacyRoute.s3_li4: Legal Obligation: retention of invoices, tax compliance
privacyRoute.s4_p1: Data related to Google reviews is collected via the Google Business Profile API after your consent. This includes the content of reviews (text, rating, date), the name or pseudonym of the contributor, and your establishment's identifier. This data is used for display in the dashboard, for generating AI response suggestions (see section 5), alerts, and reporting.
privacyRoute.s4_p2: Data Ownership: The review data displayed on Google Business Profile remains the property of the client or Google, as applicable. REPUTEXA does not claim any ownership of this content. However, REPUTEXA is authorised to process, store, and use it strictly within the provision of the service and for the purposes described herein.
privacyRoute.s5_p1: Collected reviews are processed by artificial intelligence models (providers such as OpenAI, Google, or equivalents) to generate personalised response suggestions, exclusively for the user's benefit and strictly within the scope of the REPUTEXA service.
privacyRoute.s5_p2: REPUTEXA does not sell, share, or monetise review data or content processed by AI for purposes other than providing the service. AI processes reviews solely to enable the client to respond to their reviews and improve their e-reputation; no secondary use (targeted advertising, data resale, third-party profiling) is performed.
privacyRoute.s6_body: Billing and payment data is transmitted to Stripe (Stripe, Inc.), a PCI-DSS certified provider, for processing subscriptions (Vision, Pulse, Zenith plans), tokenisation of credit cards, and issuing invoices. Sensitive banking data never passes through our servers. Stripe Policy: stripe.com/uk/privacy.
privacyRoute.s7_intro: Your data may be transferred and processed by the following subcontractors, strictly within the scope of their mission. These transfers are carried out in accordance with the GDPR and the privacy policies of each provider:
privacyRoute.s7_li1: Stripe – Payments, billing, and subscription management (cards, prorata, credits)
privacyRoute.s7_li2: Resend – Sending transactional emails (confirmation, alerts, account notifications)
privacyRoute.s7_li3: WhatsApp API (Meta) – Sending notifications and alerts (negative reviews, reminders) when you have enabled this option on your plan
privacyRoute.s7_li4: Supabase – Data hosting (database, authentication); data may be hosted in the European Union depending on configuration
privacyRoute.s7_li5: OpenAI / AI providers – Processing reviews for generating response suggestions (see section 5)
privacyRoute.s7_li6: Google – OAuth login and Google Business Profile API (reviews, establishment listings)
privacyRoute.s7_li7: Vercel – Hosting of the site and application
privacyRoute.s7_footer: These providers are subject to contractual obligations compliant with the GDPR. You can review their respective privacy policies (Stripe, Resend, Meta/WhatsApp, Supabase, etc.) on their official websites.
privacyRoute.s8_p1: The site uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the service:
privacyRoute.s8_li1: Session and Authentication: maintaining user session and securing access
privacyRoute.s8_li2: Stripe Security: cookies necessary for payment processing and fraud prevention
privacyRoute.s8_p2: These cookies do not require prior consent under Article 82 of the 'Informatique et Libertés' law and the GDPR, as they are strictly necessary for the provision of the service. No specific consent banner is displayed for these technical cookies.
privacyRoute.s9_p1: Your data is retained for the duration of your account, then for the applicable legal retention periods (billing: 10 years). Login data and logs are retained for a maximum of 12 months. In the event of account deletion, your data is deleted or anonymised within 30 days, unless legally required to retain.
privacyRoute.s10_intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacyRoute.s10_li1: Right of Access and rectification of your data
privacyRoute.s10_li2: Right to Erasure ('right to be forgotten') within the limits set by law
privacyRoute.s10_li5: Right to Object to processing, particularly for marketing purposes
privacyRoute.s10_rights: To exercise these rights, please contact us at <contactLink>contact@reputexa.co.uk</contactLink>. You may also lodge a complaint with the ICO (<icoLink>ico.org.uk</icoLink>).
privacyRoute.s11_p1: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures (SSL encryption, secure authentication, access control) to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss, or alteration.
privacyRoute.s12_p1: We reserve the right to modify this policy. Any significant changes will be communicated via email or through a notification in your client area. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the document.
privacyRoute.s13_body: For any questions regarding the protection of your data: <contactLink>contact@reputexa.co.uk</contactLink>.

faqs.q: How does the AI generate responses to reviews?
faqs.a: REPUTEXA uses Claude 3.5 Sonnet from Anthropic as the primary generation engine. In case of unavailability, GPT-4o-mini from OpenAI automatically takes over (dual-engine with seamless switching). Each response applies strict rules: "mirror effect" (reusing keywords from the review), zero hallucination, tone configured in your AI DNA.

faqs.q: Can the AI adapt the tone according to my brand identity?
faqs.a: Yes. In your establishment settings, you can define a "Brand Brief": sector, tone (formal, warm, premium…), language elements to avoid, and recurring keywords. The AI systematically incorporates these guidelines into each suggestion.

faqs.q: Are responses sent automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, partially. Positive reviews receive an automatic response with a simulated human delay of 2 to 9 hours. For negative reviews: on the VISION plan, validation occurs from the dashboard; on the PULSE and ZENITH plans, the negative review alert is sent via WhatsApp with a suggested response that you can modify or publish. Once published, the response is placed in a queue for 2 to 7 hours before going live.

faqs.q: Does the AI handle reviews in other languages?
faqs.a: On the VISION plan, the AI responds in the primary language of your establishment. On PULSE and ZENITH, the language is automatically detected for each review, and the response is generated in the same language as the original review (French, English, Spanish, German, Italian, etc.).

faqs.q: What is the accuracy of the toxicity analysis?
faqs.a: Our analysis model achieves 97.4% accuracy on our internal benchmark (10,000 manually annotated reviews). The Shield Centre distinguishes legitimate negative reviews from abusive, defamatory, or artificially generated content.

faqs.q: What is the Shield Centre?
faqs.a: The Shield Centre is our advanced monitoring system that analyses each received review based on 14 indicators: toxicity, authenticity, fraudulent intent, sentiment, cited entities, etc. It automatically generates alerts when a review requires immediate attention and can directly report certain reviews to Google.

faqs.q: How does the detection of fake reviews work?
faqs.a: Our algorithm cross-references several signals: temporal consistency (abnormal spikes in reviews), common linguistic patterns among accounts, geolocation of reviewers, activity history of profiles. An authenticity score is assigned to each review, visible in your dashboard.

faqs.q: Can I contest a review directly from REPUTEXA?
faqs.a: The AI Shield prepares a dossier (reasons, wording for moderators) to paste into the Google Business Profile reporting form. Google does not provide a public API to delete a review on your behalf: the final submission is therefore made to Google, after your review.

faqs.q: Are WhatsApp alerts included in all plans?
faqs.a: Immediate WhatsApp alerts (negative reviews) and the weekly WhatsApp summary are available from the PULSE plan ([[PX:pulse:mo]]). The VISION plan only includes email notifications. On ZENITH, the AI Capture module additionally allows you to automatically invite your customers to leave a review via WhatsApp 30 minutes after their visit.

faqs.q: How do I connect my Google Business Profile?
faqs.a: From your dashboard → Settings → Platforms, click on "Connect Google". An OAuth Google authorisation window will open — grant access to manage your listings (business.manage). The connection is established in 30 seconds and your reviews synchronise automatically. No manual API key is required.

faqs.q: Which review platforms are connected?
faqs.a: REPUTEXA synchronises Google Business Profile, Facebook, and Trustpilot. The Google connection is via OAuth; Facebook and Trustpilot via webhook. Other platforms are not yet connected — they are listed on our roadmap.

faqs.q: Can I connect REPUTEXA to my POS software or Zapier?
faqs.a: Yes, via the AI Capture module (exclusive to ZENITH). An integration key (rtx_live_…) is generated in your Settings → Integrations. This allows your POS systems (Square, SumUp) or no-code tools (Zapier, Make) to send visit data to REPUTEXA, which automatically triggers a WhatsApp invitation 30 minutes after the visit.

faqs.q: How many establishments can I manage?
faqs.a: There is no limit per plan on the number of manageable establishments — pricing is determined by the number of active establishments with a tiered discount: 1st at full price, 2nd at -20%, 3rd at -30%, 4th at -40%, 5th and more at -50%. Each establishment can be managed from a unified dashboard.

faqs.q: Can I change my plan at any time?
faqs.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade from your Settings → Subscription area. Upgrades take effect immediately with a prorated calculation. Downgrades apply at the next renewal date.

faqs.q: Does the free trial include all features?
faqs.a: Yes, the 14-day trial gives you access to the entire ZENITH plan (the most comprehensive) without restriction. No credit card is required to start.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy?
faqs.a: If you are not satisfied within the first 30 days of your subscription, we will issue a full refund. No questions asked. Contact us at support@reputexa.co.uk.

faqs.q: How often are the statistics updated?
faqs.a: Your reviews are imported as soon as they are received via webhook (in real-time). The dashboard always reflects the most recent available data. Aggregated statistics (average rating, trends) are recalculated with each dashboard load.

faqs.q: Can I export my reports in PDF?
faqs.a: Yes. Each month, a "cabinet" PDF (stats + AI texts according to your plan) is generated: factual summary in Vision; analyses, sentiment, and tactics in Pulse; enhanced strategic layer in Zenith. You receive it by email and can regenerate or download it from the dashboard archive centre. Pulse and Zenith also receive a weekly recap on WhatsApp.

faqs.q: Does REPUTEXA work for establishments outside of the UK?
faqs.a: Yes. REPUTEXA is deployed in the UK, Ireland, Belgium, Switzerland, Spain, Italy, and Germany. Our infrastructure is hosted in the European Union (London, Frankfurt) to ensure GDPR compliance in all member countries.

faqs.q: Is the interface available in multiple languages?
faqs.a: The REPUTEXA interface is available in English, French, Spanish, German, and Italian. You can change the language from your settings or the selector at the bottom of the page.

onboardingSteps.title: Create Your Account
onboardingSteps.description: Provide your establishment's details: name, type, address, WhatsApp number, and email. A verification code will be sent immediately to your email address.
onboardingSteps.detail: Cloudflare Turnstile validation protects the registration against bots. The phone number must be in international format (e.g., +447123456789).

onboardingSteps.title: Verify Your Email
onboardingSteps.description: Open the email received and enter the 6-digit code on the verification page. This code is valid for 15 minutes.
onboardingSteps.detail: If you do not receive the email, please check your spam folder. You can request a new code from the /verify page.

onboardingSteps.title: Connect Google Business Profile
onboardingSteps.description: In your dashboard → Settings → Platforms, click on 'Connect Google'. A Google OAuth window will open — grant access to manage your listings. Your reviews will be synchronised automatically.
onboardingSteps.detail: REPUTEXA only requests the business.manage permission. No access to your personal Google account is required.

onboardingSteps.title: Set Up Your AI DNA
onboardingSteps.description: In Settings → AI DNA, define the tone (professional, warm, luxurious, casual), the length of responses, and your specific instructions. The AI generates a real-time simulation.
onboardingSteps.detail: On the ZENITH plan, the Triple Judge system generates 3 variants (empathy, storytelling, expertise) and automatically selects the best one.

onboardingSteps.title: Activate WhatsApp Alerts
onboardingSteps.description: In Settings → Notifications, provide your WhatsApp number and set the alert threshold (e.g., reviews ≤ 3 stars). You will receive each negative review directly on WhatsApp with the suggested AI response.
onboardingSteps.detail: Available on PULSE and ZENITH. Alerts are sent via Twilio with interactive buttons to approve or modify the response directly from WhatsApp.

DocumentationPage.whatsappIntro: As soon as a negative review is detected, REPUTEXA automatically triggers this pipeline — no action is required on your part.

whatsappFlow.detail: A customer leaves a review ≤ 3 stars on Google, Facebook, or Trustpilot.
The AI analyses the toxicity (hate, spam, conflict of interest, doxxing) and generates an authenticity score.
A contextualised response is automatically generated, adhering to your configured AI DNA.
You receive a summary of the review + the suggested response with 2 buttons: Approve or Modify.
If approved, the response is published with a simulated delay (2–7 hours) for a natural appearance. The Shield Centre generates a dispute report if the review is fraudulent.

DocumentationPage.platformsFootnote: The Google connection uses only the business.manage permission — no access to your personal Google account.
DocumentationPage.posIntro: REPUTEXA generates an entry API key (rtx_live_…) visible in your Settings. This allows your external systems (POS software, Zapier, Make) to send visit data to REPUTEXA, which automatically triggers the AI Capture module — a WhatsApp message sent to the customer 30 minutes after their visit inviting them to leave a review.
DocumentationPage.posKeyNote: This key is for incoming webhooks (data to REPUTEXA). It is not used to read your reviews or statistics via an external API.
DocumentationPage.keysTitle: Where to Find Your Integration Keys
practices: Configure your AI DNA (tone + instructions) before receiving your first reviews so that suggestions are calibrated immediately.
Activate WhatsApp alerts on your personal or business number — it is the fastest channel to handle an urgent review.
For the POS webhook, send visit data within 10 minutes after the customer leaves, no later — the 30-minute delay of AI Capture is calculated from the receipt of the webhook.
Never share your rtx_live_ key publicly. It is linked to your account and governs the billing of your AI Capture activations.
The Shield Centre automatically analyses each received review — no configuration is necessary. Check the Alerts dashboard for critical cases.
In case of an incorrect AI response via WhatsApp, use the 'Modify' button — your correction is remembered to improve future suggestions.
DocumentationPage.ctaBody: Full access to ZENITH for 14 days, no credit card required. Your first AI review is generated in under 60 seconds after connecting Google.

posts.excerpt: The DSA imposes new obligations on review platforms. What this means for establishments and how REPUTEXA helps you stay compliant.

posts.excerpt: A practical guide with validated templates to turn a bad review into a loyalty opportunity. Includes 12 phrases to absolutely avoid.

posts.excerpt: Coordinated smear campaigns, review bombing, and astroturfing are forms of cyber attacks against which your reputation needs active protection.

guides.title: Quick Start: REPUTEXA in 5 Minutes
guides.description: Create your account, connect your Google Business Profile, and receive your first AI response suggestions. Everything you need to be operational immediately.

guides.title: Optimising Your Google Rating: Comprehensive Strategic Guide
guides.description: From 3.8 to 4.7 stars in 6 months — proven strategies to increase your average rating, maximise positive reviews, and address identified critical points.

guides.title: Customising AI Responses to Reflect Your Brand Identity
guides.description: How to set up your Brand Brief so that every AI response perfectly reflects your tone, values, and style. Includes examples by sector.

guides.title: GDPR Compliance and Customer Review Management
guides.description: Best practices for handling personal data in your reviews and responses while remaining fully compliant with the European regulatory framework.

guides.title: Shield Centre: Setting Up Alerts and Managing Fake Reviews
guides.description: Comprehensive guide to leveraging the Shield Centre — alert thresholds, interpreting toxicity scores, Google dispute procedures, and real-time WhatsApp.

guides.title: Managing Your Reputation on Google, Facebook, and Trustpilot
guides.description: Centralise your reviews across the three platforms connected by REPUTEXA and apply best practices for each ecosystem.

guides.title: Analysing Your Monthly PDF Reports Like an Expert
guides.description: How to read and interpret the 12 key metrics from your REPUTEXA report to build a concrete action plan and measure your progress month by month.

guides.title: Advanced API Integration: Connecting REPUTEXA to Your CRM
guides.description: Technical guide for integrating REPUTEXA into your ecosystem: Zapier, Make, Square, and SumUp POS systems. Includes examples of incoming webhooks and error handling patterns.

demarrage-rapide.title: Guide de démarrage
demarrage-rapide.content: Connectez votre compte Google Business Profile à REPUTEXA en quelques clics. Une fois la connexion établie, vous recevrez automatiquement les nouveaux avis et des suggestions de réponses générées par l'IA. Personnalisez le ton de vos réponses dans les paramètres pour qu'elles reflètent l'identité de votre établissement.

optimiser-notation.title: Optimiser sa notation Google
optimiser-notation.content: Répondre à tous les avis, y compris les positifs, améliore votre visibilité. Les avis négatifs bien gérés démontrent votre professionnalisme. Demandez poliment des avis à vos clients satisfaits via email ou QR code en caisse. REPUTEXA vous alerte sur les nouveaux avis pour ne jamais laisser passer une opportunité.

reponses-ia-personnalisees.title: Personnaliser les réponses IA
reponses-ia-personnalisees.content: Dans vos paramètres REPUTEXA, définissez le style souhaité : formel, décontracté, bilingue. Vous pouvez aussi ajouter des informations sur votre établissement (spécialités, valeurs) pour que l'IA produise des suggestions plus pertinentes. Chaque suggestion reste modifiable avant envoi.

conformite-rgpd.title: Conformité RGPD et avis
conformite-rgpd.content: Les avis Google sont des données à caractère personnel. REPUTEXA traite ces données conformément au RGPD. Les modèles d'IA utilisés ne réutilisent pas vos données pour l'entraînement. Vos clients conservent leurs droits (accès, rectification, effacement). Notre politique de confidentialité détaille l'ensemble des traitements.

shield-center-mode-emploi.title: Shield Center : mode d’emploi
shield-center-mode-emploi.content: Le Shield Center analyse chaque avis (toxicité, authenticité) et peut préparer un dossier de signalement. Configurez vos seuils dans Paramètres → Notifications, reliez WhatsApp pour les alertes temps réel, et consultez le tableau Alertes pour traiter les cas critiques en priorité.

multiplateforme-google-facebook-trustpil.title: Google, Facebook & Trustpilot
multiplateforme-google-facebook-trustpil.content: Connectez chaque plateforme depuis Paramètres → Plateformes. Google via OAuth ; Facebook et Trustpilot via webhook. Une fois synchronisé, vos avis arrivent dans un flux unique : répondez avec la même qualité IA partout et suivez la distribution par source dans le dashboard.

rapports-pdf-analyses.title: Lire vos rapports PDF
rapports-pdf-analyses.content: Chaque mois, REPUTEXA génère un PDF avec synthèse et recommandations. Priorisez la tendance de note, le volume par plateforme et les thèmes récurrents dans les avis négatifs. Utilisez la section recommandations IA comme checklist pour le mois suivant.

api-integration-avancee.title: API, webhooks & automatisations
api-integration-avancee.content: Sur ZENITH, générez votre clé rtx_live_ dans Paramètres → Intégrations pour envoyer des visites POS vers REPUTEXA (Zapier, Make, Square, SumUp). Respectez le format JSON documenté et testez sur un environnement de staging avant la production.
